message:
fix(lib): Panic on catch continue in query functions

Changed 'catch continue' to 'catch unreachable' in:
- pdb/breakpoints.zig: breakpoint collection
- contextvars.zig: keys() and values() collection
- cProfile/stats.zig: profile entries collection
- profile/profile_class.zig: stats sorting collection

Prevents returning incomplete results on OOM.
